description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CMake Build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has two jobs, linux and windows, each running on a different environment (ubuntu-latest and windows-latest respectively). For each job, use a matrix strategy to run multiple configurations, each with its own set of steps to install dependencies, checkout code, install Vulkan SDK, create a CMake build, build, analyze (for linux), and upload the resulting artifact.
